{{Infobox character
| name = Imperial Steward Calder Marten
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
| name = Imperial Steward Calder Marten
| aliases = Captain Calder, Calder Marten
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Imperial Steward, Captain of The Testament, Captain, Reader, Navigator, Watchmaner King of this world (meant to rule as),
| abilities = invest wood into his ship, Intent, summon Elderspawn, Reader of Memory, control the ship as part of his body, move his ship through consciousness, duelist, Emperor's Intent, consciousness projected through the Optasia
| affiliations = Blackwatch, Navigator's Guild, The Testament, The Reliable, Aurelian Empire
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

''See also: [[Imperial Steward Calder Marten Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a [[Navigator]] Captain and the former [[Imperial Steward]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]]. A twenty-six-year-old with red hair and a short beard, he commands the ship known as [[The Testament]]. His history includes serving in the [[Blackwatch]] and facing legal prosecution for various crimes, such as theft, sabotage, destruction of [[Imperial]] property, conspiracy to commit fraud, and orchestrating a jailbreak. These charges resulted in a sentence of forced labor within the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]]. Throughout his career, [[Marten]] has demonstrated significant charisma and authority, often projecting a sense of confidence even when wounded or facing extreme danger. He has been involved in major conflicts, including the unearthing of a second [[Heart of Nakothi]] and an attack on [[Gray Island]]. His political rise saw him named [[Imperial Steward]] by the [[Imperialist Guilds]], a position where he acted as a caretaker and protector of the empire while sitting on the throne. During his tenure, he oversaw the dissolution of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] and led an assault on the [[Consultants]]. Despite his reputation for being a reckless and selfish individual, he eventually faced accusations of consorting with [[Kelarac]] and was taken into custody by [[Regents]]. His life has been marked by intense physical struggles, including various wounds and the use of an orange-stained [[cutlass]] that has shown effectiveness against [[Elderspawn]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The son of [[Rojric]] and [[Alsa Grayweather]], [[Calder]] [[Marten]] served as a member of the [[Blackwatch]] before becoming one of Cheska's Navigators. As the Captain of [[The Testament]], he possesses the ability to invest wood into his ship and uses an unloaded musket as a crutch. During his time as a [[Reader of Memory]], he utilized [[Intent]] to summon [[Elderspawn]] and was involved in the captivity of Naberius following an attack on his ship in [[Candle Bay]]. After facing accusations of stealing a [[Blackwatch]] vessel, conspiring to free a prisoner, and destroying an [[Imperial]] prison, [[Marten]] was exiled to the [[Aion]] under the supervision of the Navigators.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is the son of [[Rojric]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the Captain of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] can invest wood into his ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the thirteen-year-old pupil of [[Artur Belfry]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the son of [[Alsa Grayweather]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a Captain.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] uses an unloaded musket as a crutch.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the pupil of [[Artur Belfry]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character in the story.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a Captain.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a Reader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s wife has been kidnapped or possibly killed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is one of Cheska's Navigators and was formerly of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The character's full name is [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a Captain whose ship was attacked in [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] and his crew are responsible for Naberius's captivity.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character who realizes he needs to leave.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a Reader who uses [[Intent]] to summon [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the person [[Kelarac]] is addressing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a [[Reader of Memory]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is accused of destroying an [[Imperial]] prison, conspiring to set free a prisoner, and stealing a ship belonging to the [[Blackwatch Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was exiled to the [[Aion]] under the supervision of the Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A twenty-six-year-old former [[Blackwatch]], [[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a red-haired man in a blue jacket who has been selling [[Stormwing ichor]] to alchemists. While married to Jyrine, a member of the [[Sleepless]], he has utilized [[Reading]] to glimpse her. During his travels as a [[Navigator]], he brought the [[Heart of Nakothi]] to its current location after lifting it from Naberius. Throughout his journey, he has wielded an orange-stained [[cutlass]] and an orange-and-black [[sword]], even abusing the power of [[the Emperor]]’s crown. [[Calder]] also maintains an [[Elderspawn]] pet and has demonstrated the ability to control a ship as part of his own body.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is twenty-six years old and a former [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has a file on [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character who has been selling [[Stormwing ichor]] to alchemists.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is married to Jyrine.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is awake and can control the ship as part of his body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has red hair and wears a blue jacket.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] drew a gun.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was moving away from the fight with his mother.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] lifted the [[Heart of Nakothi]] from Naberius.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] entered the hall flanked by Andel.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] abused the power of [[the Emperor]]’s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has an [[Elderspawn]] pet.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] wields an orange-stained [[cutlass]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] possesses an orange-and-black [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a [[Navigator]] who brought the Heart to its current location.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s wife is a member of the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was [[Reading]] to glimpse his wife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a twenty-six-year-old Watchman and the [[Imperial Steward]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]] who possesses the ability to navigate his ship, [[The Testament]], through his own consciousness. After being dragged from [[the Emperor]]'s palace by two [[Imperial Guards]], he was sentenced to five years of forced labor serving the [[Navigator’s Guild]]. Trained as a duelist by his mother and receiving basic instruction from his father, he carries an orange-spotted blade from [[Kelarac]] and bears [[Kelarac]]'s mark upon his arm. Throughout his history, he has fought various foes including [[Elderspawn]], cultists, and assassins, while also claiming the title of Emperor. Currently, he is part of a crew facing lethal danger as they attempt to detonate charges in an arena while struggling to stretch time as much as possible.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the name of the character referred to as [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character who can move his ship through consciousness.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was dragged out of [[the Emperor]]'s palace by two [[Imperial Guards]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the [[Imperial Steward]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] uses an orange-spotted blade given to him by [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] possesses [[Kelarac]]'s mark on his arm.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] claims to be [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]]'s full name is [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a Watchman.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was meant to rule as King of this world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was trained by his mother to be a duelist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is an Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is twenty-six years old.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was sentenced to forced labor in the service of the [[Navigator’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is wearing a three-cornered hat and a dark blue coat.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s coat buttons feature the [[Navigator]] crest.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has spent five years in a [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] received basic [[sword]] training from his father and advanced instruction from his mother.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has a ship named [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has a debt to the throne caused by a daring rescue plan.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has fought [[Elderspawn]], cultists, rebels, [[Consultant assassins]], [[Imperial Guards]], and [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is part of a crew planning to detonate charges in an arena.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a [[Navigator]] aboard his ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is part of a crew headed into lethal danger.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a person who has been trying to stretch time as much as possible.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Driven by a complex blend of ambition, passion, and the lingering sting of healing wounds, [[Calder]] [[Marten]] operates as a [[Consultant]] saboteur. After [[Lucan]] elected to hold a private meeting with him, [[Marten]] took charge of leading an attack for the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]]. This individual, who once famously tore through with [[the Emperor]]'s crown, has maintained a connection with [[Shera]]. Ultimately, he is characterized as a novice Emperor who has finally discovered a true [[sword]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s intent is described as passion, ambition, satisfaction, and the itch of still-healing wounds.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a [[Consultant]] saboteur.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] elected to meet with [[Calder]] [[Marten]] alone.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is leading the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]] attack.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a person who once tore through with [[the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is referred to as a novice Emperor who has 'found himself a real [[sword]]'.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character who has been with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A spawn of Urg'naut, [[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a crew member of [[The Reliable]] who possesses a young face and a short, red beard. He is often seen clad in pure white armor from the neck down, including a helmet featuring a visor of darkened glass. During his travels, he lent a tiny [[spyglass]] to [[Petal]] and has demonstrated the ability to use [[the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]]. Furthermore, his consciousness has been projected through the [[Optasia]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] wore a suit of pure white armor that covered him from head to toe.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s helmet visor was covered by what looked like darkened glass.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a spawn of Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has a young face and a short, red beard.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] wears [[the Emperor]]'s white armor from the neck down.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Captain [[Calder]] lent [[Petal]] a tiny [[spyglass]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] uses [[the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s consciousness was projected through the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a crew member of [[The Reliable]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As the [[Imperial Steward]] and a [[Navigator]], [[Calder]] [[Marten]] insisted on attending a high-level meeting where he participated in debates that led to his potential endorsement as Emperor. During this time, [[Estyr Six]] mentioned him amidst accusations that he was consorting with [[Kelarac]], a figure for whom [[Marten]] acted as a pawn. After narrowly escaping being burned, [[Marten]] released a statement promising to address the Capital, though he utilized a body double wearing the [[Emperor's clothes]] to speak for him. Although many believed him to be dead, he resurfaced as a pretender to the throne wearing the [[Emperor's armor]] and wielding an orange Awakened blade. [[Marten]], who commands a ship with a bound humanoid fish-creature, claimed to have spoken to the man in the sky and was seen conversing with [[Imperial Guards]], despite [[Estyr Six]]'s threat to kill him if he strayed from line.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a leader who will insist on being at the meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a participant in the debate and may be endorsed as Emperor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a character mentioned by [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has been accused of consorting with [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was almost burned.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a pawn of [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] released a statement saying he would address the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] uses a body double to address the public.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The body double wears [[the Emperor]]’s clothes but not [[Calder]]'s white armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was seen sitting and chatting with [[Imperial Guards]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Steward]] is [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] is the pretender to the throne and wears [[the Emperor]]’s armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] was thought to be dead.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] claims to have spoken to the man in the sky.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] mentioned she would kill [[Calder]] [[Marten]] if he got out of line.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] has a ship with a humanoid fish-creature bound to it.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] [[Marten]] held an orange Awakened blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Yes, ma’am. This is my son Calder, ma’am.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Then I suggest you get ready, Captain.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Calder still couldn’t see the world around him, but he managed to speak. “Andel. Foster. I was wrong. We need to leave.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“So you come to me again, Reader of Memory,” Kelarac said.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Twenty-six years old, former Blackwatch, once indicted for the destruction of an entire Imperial Prison.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
